visual_mood: Text wraps along the wooden surface the sunglasses rest on -- text and product share the same physical plane

text_elements.position: printed/embossed on the surface around the product

product.placement: Resting on a dark concrete surface where the text appears printed or painted onto the surface around it. Product and text on the same physical plane.
product.instruction: Only ONE pair matching the reference. Real glossy sunglasses on a real surface. The text looks painted or stenciled onto the surface, not floating above it.

prompt: A product photograph on a dark concrete surface. The text wraps around and follows the surface near the product. Warm overhead light illuminates both text and product equally. Small 'DUBERY POLARIZED' painted on the surface below. DuberyMNL logo bottom-right. 4:5 aspect ratio.
